HeroSection.name: Eiffelya
HeroSection.tagline: Where European Elegance Meets Aleppo’s Warmth
HeroSection.description: A refined family dining experience in the heart of Aleppo, serving a masterful blend of Eastern and Western cuisine with a modern touch of luxury.

StoryPreview.label: Our Story
StoryPreview.title: A New Concept of Family Luxury
StoryPreview.description: We didn’t just open a restaurant; we created a space that balances sophisticated design with a cozy family atmosphere. At Eiffelya, we believe the perfect meal is served in a place that feels both premium and welcoming.

MenuPreview.label: From Our Kitchen
MenuPreview.title: Eiffelya’s Signature Selection
MenuPreview.description: Dishes that define the Eiffelya experience — each one a labor of passion, crafted with the finest ingredients to satisfy your refined taste.

Testimonials.label: What Our Guests Say
Testimonials.title: Stories from Our Table
Testimonials.description: Nothing means more to us than the memories our guests take home.

items.quote: The place is breathtaking, and the burgers are top-notch. Truly a premium experience and very clean food.
items.author: Samer A.

items.quote: Finally, a sophisticated place in Aleppo where we can bring the family and feel comfortable. The vibe is chill and the luxury is evident.
items.author: Lina K.

items.quote: The Neapolitan pizza is a dream, reminded me of Italy. The decor and details are just beautiful; a must-visit.
items.author: M. & Rima

items.quote: The service is very professional and the food is delicious and hot. We had a family event and everything was perfect.
items.author: Ahmad H.

OurStoryPage.label: Our Journey
OurStoryPage.title: Eiffelya: A Passion for Excellence in Aleppo
OurStoryPage.description: In the heart of Aleppo, Eiffelya blends European elegance with the warmth of Aleppian hospitality for an exceptional dining experience.

section1.label: The Beginning
section1.title: A Vision Built to Last
section1.p1: Eiffelya was established to be Aleppo's premier destination for 'Luxury Casual Dining.' Inspired by European sophistication, we blended it with the authentic Aleppine hospitality we hold dear.
section1.p2: In our kitchen, we don't just cook; we craft dishes that range from classic American burgers to authentic Italian pizzas, with innovative touches that make every meal a story worth telling.
section1.p3: Eiffelya is more than just a place to eat; it is a home for every family that appreciates art, beauty, and refined taste.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: The Three Pillars
philosophy.description: We adhere to strict standards to ensure an unforgettable experience with every visit.

items1.title: Quality First
items1.description: We source the finest meats and freshest ingredients daily to deliver world-class dishes with a professional touch.

items2.title: Effortless Elegance
items2.description: Our space is designed to be comfortable for families and sophisticated for events—a perfect balance of warmth and luxury.

items3.title: The Spirit of Aleppo
items3.description: Despite our international flair, we remain rooted in the Aleppine hospitality that makes every guest feel at home.

CTASection.title: Be Part of Our Journey
CTASection.description: Every evening, new chapters of refined taste are written around our tables. We look forward to welcoming you to create unforgettable memories together.

CTA.title: Ready to Experience Eiffelya?
CTA.description: Whether it is an intimate dinner for two or a grand family celebration, we would love to welcome you to our table.

Footer.description: Eiffelya is a refined family restaurant in Aleppo, where European elegance meets the warmth of Aleppine hospitality for an unforgettable dining experience.
Footer.address: Aleppo, Al-Mokambo, next to Etihad Pool
Footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe for exclusive offers and seasonal menu updates.

header.label: Contact Us
header.title: We Would Love to Hear From You
header.description: Whether you want to make a reservation or inquire about private events, our team is always here to help.

form.title: Contact Us
form.description: Fill out the form and you will be redirected directly to WhatsApp.

LocationSection.label: Explore Our Space
LocationSection.title: One Destination, Two Unique Experiences
LocationSection.description: Under one roof in the heart of Aleppo, we’ve blended the elegance of classic dining with the vibrant energy of gourmet fast food. Two distinct floors, each with its own soul, flavor, and identity.

classic.name: Eiffelya Classic (First Floor)
classic.description: Dedicated to those who seek tranquility and refined taste, serving a masterful blend of Eastern and Western cuisine in a sophisticated family atmosphere.

express.name: Eiffelya Fast Food (Second Floor)
express.description: Where energy meets global flavors; from gourmet burgers to Napoletana pizzas, we serve your favorites with Eiffelya’s unique touch in a modern setting.

LocationSection.title_map: At the Heart of the City
LocationSection.description_map: We welcome you to Eiffelya in an elegant setting with a convenient location, where refined hospitality and exceptional flavors come together in every visit.

hero.label: Our Menu
hero.title: An Exceptional Dining Experience for Every Taste
hero.description: From refined hospitality to globally inspired flavors, discover a culinary experience where elegance, comfort, and unforgettable taste come together.

events.label: Private Events
events.title: Celebrate Your Moments in Style
events.description: From elegant family gatherings to sophisticated corporate dinners, we offer refined spaces and exceptional service designed to make every occasion memorable.

family.name: Eiffelya
family.description: A refined dining destination designed for families and friends to gather around rich flavors and timeless recipes, complemented by a warm atmosphere and exceptional hospitality.

fastFood.name: Eiffelya Fast Food
fastFood.description: A modern fast-casual experience combining speed, premium ingredients, and bold flavors — crafted for those who value quality without slowing down.

root.title: Eiffelya | Luxury Casual Dining in Aleppo
root.description: Eiffelya is your destination for a refined and comfortable dining experience in Aleppo. A masterful fusion of Eastern and Western cuisine in a European ambiance.
root.ogTitle: Eiffelya - Where Elegance Meets Aleppo's Warmth

about.title: Our Story
about.description: Discover the journey of Eiffelya, from vision to reality in the heart of Aleppo. Our passion for delivering an extraordinary dining experience.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.description: Explore Eiffelya's menu: from premium American burgers and Italian pizzas to refined family meals in Aleppo.
